blended.narrative: Granite Peak is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 971 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 40°F.
